name: Cash Plus Pawn
description_short: FirstCash is the leading international operator of pawn stores with 3,300+ locations across 29 U.S. states, the UK, and Latin America, offering pawn loans, retail sales, and gold buying services.
description_long:
FirstCash, Inc. is a publicly traded company (component of S&P MidCap 400 and Russell 2000 indices) headquartered in Fort Worth, Texas, operating as the leading international pawn store chain. Founded and scaled to serve cash and credit-constrained consumers, the company has grown to operate more than 3,300 retail pawn locations across North America and Latin America, employing approximately 22,000 people. FirstCash also operates a subsidiary, AFF, which provides lease-to-own and retail finance payment solutions through 15,000+ merchant partner locations.

FirstCash's core services include pawn loans secured by personal property (jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, musical instruments), retail sales of merchandise, gold and precious metal buying, and layaway services with 10% down payments. Pawn loans are non-recourse, meaning customers only lose the pledged item if they don't repay—the lender cannot pursue additional collections. The company buys and sells a wide variety of merchandise and claims to buy "almost anything of value."

What distinguishes FirstCash is its scale and geographic reach compared to independent pawn shops, plus its dual-business model combining traditional pawn operations with technology-driven point-of-sale payment solutions through AFF. The company's public status and index inclusion reflects stability and operational standardization across locations. Their website emphasizes convenience, immediate cash payouts, and a non-recourse loan structure that appeals to consumers needing fast liquidity without credit checks.

For consumers, FirstCash represents a mainstream, large-scale alternative to independent pawn shops, with greater accountability as a public company. However, pawn loans carry high effective interest rates due to the short-term nature and collateral risk, making them expensive for borrowing despite being faster than traditional credit. The layaway service offers an alternative to credit, but still requires upfront capital. Best suited for consumers with immediate cash needs and valuable collateral who cannot access traditional credit.
address: 5980 Rufe Snow Dr, North Richland Hills, TX 76180

company_info.headquarters: 5980 Rufe Snow Dr, North Richland Hills, TX 76180

pros: Non-recourse loans mean no debt collection if you default—you only lose the pledged item
3,300+ locations across 29 U.S. states, UK, and Latin America for convenient access
Immediate cash payouts on the spot for gold, jewelry, and merchandise sales
Buys and sells diverse merchandise including jewelry, electronics, tools, instruments, and appliances
Layaway service available with just 10% down payment as credit-free alternative
Public company (S&P MidCap 400, Russell 2000) providing transparency and operational standardization
No credit check required for pawn loans—based solely on item value and condition
cons: Pawn loans are expensive relative to traditional credit due to short terms and high interest rates; effective annual cost can exceed 100%
Risk of losing valuable personal property if unable to repay the loan within the loan period
Limited to customers with valuable collateral—cannot serve those without pledgeable assets
Layaway service requires upfront 10% down payment, which may not help those with immediate cash needs
Interest rates and loan terms not prominently disclosed on website, requiring in-store inquiry
best_for: Consumers with immediate cash needs who own valuable items (jewelry, electronics, tools) and lack access to traditional credit
Individuals seeking non-recourse loans where default doesn't trigger collection activity
People wanting to buy merchandise at discounted prices through pawn store inventory
Gold and precious metal sellers needing instant cash without commission fees or waiting periods
diagnosis: FirstCash is best for consumers with immediate cash needs and valuable collateral who cannot access traditional credit, seeking the convenience and scale of a large pawn chain. The main caveat is that pawn loans are inherently expensive relative to other credit products, with effective annual rates typically exceeding conventional loans, and carry the risk of losing pledged property if unable to repay.
services: Pawn loans secured by personal property (non-recourse)
Gold and precious metal buying with immediate cash payment
Retail sales of jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, and merchandise
Purchase of sporting goods and musical instruments
Point-of-sale payment solutions through AFF subsidiary
